transcript: Could you make room for me here this, uh... this morning?
For about ten to fifteen minutes?
I haven't got any rooms. I can't make room for you in a room I haven't got.
Could you make, uh... could you make room for, uh... for just about ten to fifteen minutes?
No, I'm not going to put you in somebody's room for ten or fifteen minutes.
They... well, they'll be asleep. They'll be none the wiser.
No. You'll have to try some place else.
Can I just, like... crash out in your room for a few minutes?
Just, you know... it'll he... it'll be rejuvenating somewhat, you know?
No, you'll have to try some place else.
Hmm... but you're... in my neighborhood?
I don't know what to tell you.
Could you... could you work on my feet for a little while? [laughing]
Well, why don't you go fuck yourself, man?
What are you trying to say? [laughing]
